title: Software Engineering Project Examination Timeline
description: A visual flowchart depicting the sequential process and key phases of a semester-end examination for a Software Engineering & Project Management module.
relationships: Starts with the distribution of the syllabus and exam format
Leads to a dedicated period for student preparation and revision
Culminates in the final written examination
Followed by the evaluation of answers by the examiner
Results are then compiled and officially published
Ends with students reviewing their grades and feedback
